full_text:
Fei Cheng 費承
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fei Cheng (費承). Served Shu. Son of Fei Yi, and his heir. Older brother to Fei Gong. Fei Cheng was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
